events.label: reasoning
events.text: The scenario: Lockout/Tagout (LOTO) field service, observed condition is "lock without tag / tag without lock." Work is in-progress. Reference OSHA 1910.147. This is a sequence/compliance check. OSHA 1910.147 requires both lock AND tag - a lock without a tag or tag without a lock is non-compliant. Work must stop; proper LOTO with both lock and tag must be applied before work continues. Decision: fail. Risk: high/critical. Component conditions: non-compliant.
